creator: wildzander@gmail.com
text:
Regards.

Yes, this behavior is observed in the shell. For example in the Nano editor the keys work correctly. 
As for the keyboard, it is the built-in keyboard of an old Acer Aspire V5-471PG laptop. The same error is also present when connecting an external USB keyboard.
Also tested under FreeBSD 12.4 and FreeBSD 13.1, - same error.
Also tested under Dragonfly BSD 6.2 and Dragonfly BSD 6.4, - no error, keys work correctly including the delete key.
I will test FreeBSD 14.0-RC2 today or tomorrow.

Thank you and have a nice day.
